buildCmd: DARK_MODE=class npx tailwindcss -i global.css -o .design-sync/compiled.css --config tailwind.config.js && NODE_PATH=./.ds-sync/node_modules node .design-sync/prebundle.mjs

dtsPropsFor.Button: variant?: 'default' | 'primary' | 'destructive' | 'outline' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'link'; size?: 'default' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'icon'; disabled?: boolean; onPress?: () => void; className?: string; style?: object; children?: React.ReactNode
dtsPropsFor.Badge: label: string; variant?: 'default' | 'square'; className?: string; style?: object
dtsPropsFor.Chip: label: string; className?: string; style?: object
dtsPropsFor.Text: variant?: 'default' | 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'p' | 'lead' | 'large' | 'small' | 'muted' | 'info' | 'badge' | 'stats'; className?: string; style?: object; children?: React.ReactNode
dtsPropsFor.Alert: variant?: 'default' | 'destructive'; icon?: React.ComponentType<{ size?: number; color?: string }>; className?: string; children?: React.ReactNode
dtsPropsFor.CollapsibleSection: title: string; rightElement?: React.ReactNode; defaultCollapsed?: boolean; className?: string; children?: React.ReactNode
dtsPropsFor.CardListView: card?: { id: string; name: string; set_name?: string; latest_price?: number } | undefined
dtsPropsFor.SkeletonText: loading?: boolean; variant?: 'default' | 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'muted' | 'small'; className?: string; children?: React.ReactNode
dtsPropsFor.TabRow: options: { value: string; label: string }[]; startingIdx?: number; onValueChange?: (value: string) => void; className?: string
dtsPropsFor.Tabs: value: string; onValueChange: (value: string) => void; children?: React.ReactNode
